hero.headline:
Power Your Business
Without Compromise
hero.subhead: Belgium's lithium-free commercial battery storage. Graphene supercapacitor technology with 99% round-trip efficiency and a 35-year warranty.

why.headline: Three reasons your CFO will sign off on it.
why.card_1_text: Peak-shaving and time-of-use arbitrage on Belgium's day-ahead market. Most commercial sites recover the system cost in under five years — and keep saving for thirty more.
why.card_2_text: Graphene supercapacitor chemistry, not lithium. No fire risk, no ventilation requirements, no insurance loading. Install it inside the building.
why.card_3_text: Industry-leading longevity means the system outlives the loan, the building's HVAC, and probably the operations director who signed off on it.

usecases.headline: Solutions for Every Sector
usecases.card_1_text: Reduce peak-demand charges and store solar energy for later use. Ideal for offices, retail spaces, and mixed-use developments.
usecases.card_2_text: Handle heavy cycling loads with zero degradation. Perfect for demand response, load shifting, and backup power in manufacturing environments.
usecases.card_3_text: Offer your clients a safer, longer-lasting alternative to lithium. Our installer program includes training, certification, and margin support.

stats.headline: Trusted on industrial sites across Belgium

cta.headline: Let's talk.
cta.subhead: Join European businesses already benefiting from safer, longer-lasting energy storage. Made in Belgium, built for decades.

contact.headline: Get a binding ROI assessment
contact.subhead: 30 minutes. Bring your last electricity bill. We'll size a system, run a real ROI on your numbers, and tell you if it doesn't make sense.
